availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: This is the Chirouse version of the Ten Commandments in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: Decem Dei Mandata: The ten commandments of God
Decem Dei Mandata: The Ten Commandments of God
1. Klob chor tlo ador rhol decho Sherhk Siam.
1. 쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 톫uador x팳퉝ul퉢 d톛c팳'u툾 s팳톛q si툾ab.
콃i chorh tlemarhatleldu tsisk tsedelh.
huy c팳톛x퉝 톫톛b톛x팳a쿹'il퉢dx퉝 cick퉢퉝 c톛di톫.
2. Weorh degwe kwe tlas atsda adok p캐tl캒tlh k Sherk Siam.
2. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)툾a툾s 툾톛 t톛 sda툾 툾톛 duk퉝 p팻a쿹'a쿹' k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
Klal bassista w캡 orh degwe tlas atsda ak patlatlh kwe l캐l캡 stam!
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛s툾ist톛툾, x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)툾a툾s 툾톛 t톛 sda툾 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹' k퉝i l톛li툾 stab!
3. Alh kw캐ssasshoskrharha 캐ld캒t atas ooyud ts캡k twal di Sherk Siam!
3. ha툾톫 k퉝i s톛shuys k퉝i x팳a툾x팳a툾톛톫dat, 툾톛 t(i) adshuyud cuk퉝 dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab!
4. Dogwe kwe tlas asshoss ta 캐ts gwa adban et캐 sk콄킗,
4. d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adss팳uuc ti adsg퉝a툾 adbad 툾i t(i) adsk퉢퉝uy,
Delh dogwe tlo darhul캡 ak ago.
di톫 d톛g퉝i 톫ud톛x퉝h톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i ha툾k퉝.
5. W캡 orh degwe tlo gualalchorh.
5. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i 톫ug퉝톛lald c팳톛x퉝.
Klal bassista weorh degwe kwe tlas rhoyalk
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsx팳퉝톛yalq.
6. W캡 orh dogwe kwi tlass siayus ak s캡킗lh.
6. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫assyayus 툾톛 k퉝i s톛yi툾톫
Klal ba assista weorh degwe kwe tla's petedgwassem twal s캡킗lh.
쿹'al퉢b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsp톛tidg퉝as톛b dx퉝툾al s톛yi툾톫.
7. We orh dogwe kwe tlas kada,
7. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsqada.
Klal baassista we orh dogwe kwe tlasrhu캡l캒l.
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsx팳톛lal톛k퉝.
8. Weorh dogwe kw tlas 콞콄y캡malh
8. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsuhuyuba톫.
Klal bussista weorh degwe kwi tlasbedchem.
쿹'al퉢b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsb톛dc팳톛b.
9. Weor degwe kwe tlas pet캡dgwassem twalh so콄igwas ak patlhatlh
9. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsp톛tidg퉝as톛b dx퉝툾al shuyg퉝as 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹',
Day캐킗 twalks mali캡 kwe tladrhach assut.
day퉢ay dx퉝툾al k퉝si mali톛 k퉝i 톫(u)adx팳톛c팳'팳ascut.
10. Weorh degwe kwe tlas캡kwamed gwal l캐l캣 stam Rhelhte skada.
10. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫ashik퉝bid g퉝톛톫 l톛li툾 stab x팳톛톫ti sqada.
